item.title: Do it yourself (DIY)
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: How-Tos in Paraguay: recipes, natural skincare, and practical step-by-step guides for kitchen, home, and everyday life.

item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: Homemade recipes: simple, local, and practical.

item.title: Local Life
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)

item.title: Paraguay Facts
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: Learn more about Paraguay: traditions, geography, and regions—ideal as a quick starting point and for reference.

item.title: Costs & Money
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: “Typical costs, salaries, and money matters in Paraguay – explained in an understandable and practical way.”

item.title: Everyday Life & Housing

item.description: Everyday life in Paraguay: housing, neighborhood life, routines, and common pitfalls—with practical tips.

item.title: Getting Around

item.title: Health
